examples: One person must prepare for it with the same tenacity and quickness as one does for a fencing tournament or a chess match.
She was known for the quickness of her wit.
He amazes me with his quickness and eagerness to learn.
Coach Jim Boeheim assembled a bunch of guys with impressive size and surprising quickness.
And Richmond, which committed only three turnovers, used its quickness to get Charlotte in foul trouble.
